platform_decisions.content: Non-streaming fallback on 529 capacity errors with dynamic timeout and funnel telemetry
Stale connection detection via ECONNRESET/EPIPE cause chain; feature-gated keep-alive pool disable on retry
SSL/TLS error extraction from 5-level cause chain with OpenSSL code to user-hint mapping
Rate limit reset timestamps parsed as Unix epoch; persistent retry respects window reset (6hr cap)
Volatile system prompt sections with selective per-section cache breaking
Tool description memoization with deferred tool set tracking; untracked speculation agents excluded
Three-layer tool search: exact match then MCP prefix then keyword scoring (name 10-12pts, hint 4pts, desc 2pts)
Tool search detects pending MCP servers and returns them so model knows to retry
Post-compaction tool selection falls back from deferred to loaded set to avoid retry churn
Multi-scenario mock rate limiting framework with 20+ predefined scenarios (ant-only testing)
Exceeded rate limit tracking with time-relative reset aggregation; representative claim = furthest reset
Voice mode feature-gated at build and runtime; platform-specific microphone permission paths
Config fallback to platform defaults with bridge sync; session-scoped REPL bridge toggle
Context overflow: parse error message, compute availableContext with 1000-token safety buffer, retry with adjusted max_tokens
OAuth token refresh with multi-provider credential clearing (AWS/GCP/Vertex/Bedrock specific patterns)
MCP resource fetching with per-server failure isolation; one server crash doesnt block others
MCP tool name normalization: double-underscore split for MCP, CamelCase split for regular tools
Scenario-based mock header injection with state preservation for overage scenarios
Mock fast-mode rate limit expiry with dynamic retry-after computation and duration thresholds
Strict tool result pairing validation: 1:1 tool_use_id to tool_result mapping when enabled
Advisor block stripping and caller field removal on message transit (selective per message role)
